title: CRYONIX TEXTURE
description: Maximize your FPS and dominate PvP. Features a custom shield cooldown animation, animated Golden Apples, Pearls, Wind Bursts, and Crossbows, plus small handheld textures for maximum field of view.
body:
# Project Overview

This resource pack is designed to enhance your survival, PvP, and utility experience in Minecraft. It brings a clean visual overhaul to essential combat gear, optimizes your field of view with compact item models, integrates helpful UI guides, and introduces smooth custom animations to bring your game to life.

---

## Features Breakdown

### Combat and Gear
* **Revamped Swords:** Brand new, clean, and highly stylized textures for all swords to make combat feel more satisfying.
* **Upgraded Crossbows:** Fully redesigned crossbow textures featuring a dynamic, multi-stage loading animation so you can visually see exactly when your shot is ready.
* **Ender Pearls:** Reimagined Ender Pearl textures with a sleek, mystical look.

### Custom Visual Animations
* **Ender Pearl Animation:** Smooth, dynamic motion added directly to the Ender Pearl item texture.
* **Wind Burst Animation:** A custom-tailored, fluid animation effect for the Wind Burst enchantment, giving your heavy mace attacks a much more powerful visual impact.

### Utility and Blocks
* **Built-in Brewing Guide:** A handy brewing chart is integrated directly into the Brewing Stand user interface, allowing you to check recipes instantly without leaving the game or opening a browser.
* **Clean Wools:** Smoother, highly vibrant textures for all wool blocks, making them look excellent for building, creative projects, and minigames.

### Compact "Small" Handheld Models
To maximize screen visibility during intense gameplay or combat, this pack introduces low-profile, compact item models when held in your hand:
* **Small Totems:** Keeps the Totem of Undying compact and out of your central point of view, giving you a massive visibility advantage.
* **Small Potions:** Sleek, minimized potion bottle models when held in either your main hand or off-hand.
* **Small Foods:** Compact models for essential food items like steak and other common food sources, keeping your screen clear while you eat.

---

## Compatibility and Installation

* **Recommended Setups:** This pack runs on vanilla Minecraft, but using a modern modded environment (such as Sodium paired with CIT Resewn and Continuity, or OptiFine) ensures that all custom animations and specific item models render perfectly.
* **How to Install:** Download the file, drop the ZIP folder into your game's "resourcepacks" directory, and activate it in your in-game options menu.

---

## CRYONIX LAUNCHER: My friends and my project!

My friend and I are currently working on an exciting new project: a brand new, optimized Minecraft launcher built specifically for mobile devices. This launcher will allow you to play full Minecraft Java Edition right on your phone or tablet, making it easier than ever to enjoy Java mods, texture packs, and servers on the go.

If you want to follow the development, test early builds, or just hang out with the community, come join our official server!

## Credits: 
This pack utilizes a base framework/assets from Vanilla Tweaks under their distribution guideline
